changes.summary: Added GetWalletBalanceUseCase (BC-02) with resolveWalletCommunityId via MeritResolverService (inv-20), authoritative wallet reads via WalletService, and getNonNegativeBalance guard (inv-16). Exposes getBalance and getWalletByCommunity for router delegation.
Delegated wallets.getByCommunity and wallets.getBalance to GetWalletBalanceUseCase via createGetWalletBalanceUseCase factory; permission checks remain in router.

notes: Use case instantiated manually in router (applicationUseCaseProviders registration deferred to a follow-up work unit). Permission checks for getByCommunity remain in the router layer.
